summary: Amazon Dispatch Features Testing Complete - All 20 backend tests passed, all frontend features verified working. New features tested: bulk dispatch, courier edit, mandatory LR for self-ship, delete order (admin only), role-based access control.
seed_data_creation: Created test_dispatch_user for dispatch role testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Amazon Dispatch features fully tested. All new features working correctly.

backend_apis.POST /api/amazon/upload-pdf: PASS - No longer requires courier_name for self_ship
backend_apis.POST /api/amazon/orders/bulk-dispatch: PASS - Dispatches multiple easy_ship orders at once
backend_apis.PUT /api/amazon/orders/{id}/courier: PASS - Updates courier name for an order
backend_apis.PUT /api/amazon/orders/{id}/dispatch: PASS - Requires LR number for self_ship (returns 400 without it)
backend_apis.DELETE /api/amazon/orders/{id}: PASS - Admin only, returns 400 for dispatched orders
backend_apis.PUT /api/amazon/orders/{id}/mark-packed: PASS - Accessible by packaging and dispatch roles

access_control.packaging_role: PASS - Can access GET /api/amazon/orders, bulk-dispatch, courier update, mark-packed
access_control.dispatch_role: PASS - Can access GET /api/amazon/orders, bulk-dispatch, courier update, dispatch, mark-packed
access_control.admin_role: PASS - Full access to all endpoints including delete

amazon_orders_page.ship_type_filter: PASS - All/Easy Ship/Self Ship filter working
amazon_orders_page.delete_button: PASS - Admin only, with confirmation dialog
amazon_orders_page.upload_pdf_dialog: PASS - No courier selection field for self_ship

amazon_dispatch_page.easy_ship_tab: PASS - Checkboxes, select-all, Dispatch Selected button
amazon_dispatch_page.self_ship_tab: PASS - Courier column with edit button, mandatory LR dispatch

navigation.admin_nav: PASS - Amazon Orders, Amazon Packing, Amazon Dispatch visible
navigation.packaging_nav: PASS - Amazon Orders, Amazon Packing, Amazon Dispatch visible

role_based_ui.packaging_amazon_orders: PASS - No Upload PDF button, no delete buttons
role_based_ui.dispatch_amazon_dispatch: PASS - Full access to dispatch features
